name: infernodrift4
description: InfernoDrift4, evolved from the current InfernoDrift game.

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server
scripts.typecheck: node --check script.js && node --check smoke_games.mjs && node --check smoke_devmode.mjs && node --check apps/server/src/index.js && node --check tests/server.test.mjs
